summary: Comprehensive testing of HoneyPrompt major refactor with role-based authentication system completed successfully. Backend: 95.9% success rate (47/49 tests). Frontend: 100% success with all role-based UI features working correctly.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: API key not recognized immediately after creation
flaky_endpoints.workaround: May need small delay between API key creation and usage

passed_tests: Backend: Role-based authentication with user/admin registration and login
Backend: Proper role validation - admin endpoints return 403 for user role
Backend: Decoy Data CRUD operations (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE) working correctly
Backend: Chat integration with dynamic decoy responses from database
Backend: All existing endpoints (dashboard, attacks, profiles, users, honeypots)
Backend: Export functionality, webhooks, API keys management
Frontend: Login page with User and Admin role selection tabs
Frontend: Registration page with role selection functionality
Frontend: User login redirects to / (ChatGPT-like chat interface)
Frontend: User cannot access /admin/* routes (proper route protection)
Frontend: Admin dashboard navigation including new Decoy Data page
Frontend: Decoy Data page with list, create dialog, and management features
Frontend: User chat page with suggestions and real-time AI responses
Frontend: All authentication flows and logout functionality
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: External API scan endpoint may need small delay between API key creation and usage to allow proper activation.
